import FLT.HaarMeasure.HaarChar.AdeleRing
import FLT.Mathlib.GroupTheory.DoubleCoset
import FLT.Mathlib.Topology.HomToDiscrete
/-

# Fujisaki's lemma

We prove a lemma which Voight (in his quaternion algebra book) attributes to Fujisaki:
if `D` is a finite-dimensional division algebra over a number field `K`
and if `U вКЖ (D вКЧ[K] рЭФЄ_K^infty)Ћ£` is a compact open subgroup then the double coset
space `DЋ£ \ (D вКЧ[K] рЭФЄ_K^infty)Ћ£ / U` is finite.

-/

suppress_compilation

open IsDedekindDomain MeasureTheory

open scoped TensorProduct

variable (K : Type*) [Field K] [NumberField K]
variable (D : Type*) [DivisionRing D] [Algebra K D]

namespace NumberField.AdeleRing.DivisionAlgebra

set_option quotPrecheck false in
/-- `D_рЭФЄ` is notation for `D вКЧ[K] рЭФЄ_K`. -/
notation "D_рЭФЄ" => (D вКЧ[K] AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)

open scoped TensorProduct.RightActions

/-- The inclusion DЋ£ вЖТ D_рЭФЄЋ£ as a group homomorphism. -/
noncomputable abbrev incl : DЋ£ вЖТ* D_рЭФЄЋ£ :=
  Units.map Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeftRingHom.toMonoidHom

namespace Aux

/-- The inclusion of K^n into рЭФЄ^n. -/
abbrev incl_Kn_рЭФЄKn : (Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ K) вЖТ
    (Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K) :=
  fun x i вЖ¶ algebraMap K (AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K) (x i)

theorem Kn_discrete : вИА x : (Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ K),
    вИГ U : Set (Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K),
    IsOpen U вИІ (incl_Kn_рЭФЄKn K D)вБї¬є' U = {x} := by
  exact (DiscretePi (algebraMap K (AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)) (Module.finrank K D))
    (NumberField.AdeleRing.discrete K)

variable [FiniteDimensional K D]

/-- The K-algebra equivalence of D and K^n. -/
abbrev D_iso : (D вЙГвВЧ[K] ((Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ K))) := Module.Finite.equivPi K D

-- Mathlib#29315....
attribute [local instance 1100] IsTopologicalSemiring.toIsModuleTopology

-- ...makes this work
example : IsModuleTopology (AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)
    ((Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)) := inferInstance

/-- The рЭФЄ-algebra equivalence of D_рЭФЄ and рЭФЄ^d. -/
abbrev DрЭФЄ_iso : (D_рЭФЄ вЙГвВЧ[(AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)] ((Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K))) :=
  ((TensorProduct.RightActions.Module.TensorProduct.comm _ _ _).symm).trans
    (TensorProduct.AlgebraTensorModule.finiteEquivPi K D (AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K))

/-- The topological equivalence via DрЭФЄ_iso. -/
abbrev DрЭФЄ_iso_top : D_рЭФЄ вЙГL[(AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)]
    ((Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)) :=
  IsModuleTopology.continuousLinearEquiv (DрЭФЄ_iso K D)

theorem D_discrete_extracted (U : Set (Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)) :
    incl_Kn_рЭФЄKn K D вБї¬є' U  = (D_iso K D) ''
    (вЗС(DрЭФЄ_iso_top K D) вИШ (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D вЖТвВР[K] D_рЭФЄ) вБї¬є' U) := by
  ext x
  constructor
  ¬Ј intro hx
    use (D_iso K D).symm x
    simpa [вЖР Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one] using hx
  ¬Ј intro вЯ®y, hy1, hy2вЯ©
    have : (DрЭФЄ_iso_top K D) вИШ (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D вЖТвВР[K] D_рЭФЄ) =
        (incl_Kn_рЭФЄKn K D) вИШ (D_iso K D) := by
      ext d n
      simp [вЖР Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]
    rw [this] at hy1
    simpa [вЖР hy2] using hy1

theorem D_discrete : вИА x : D, вИГ U : Set D_рЭФЄ,
    IsOpen U вИІ (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D вЖТвВР[K] D_рЭФЄ) вБї¬є' U = {x} := by
  apply Discrete_of_HomeoDiscrete (Y' := ((Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ AdeleRing (рЭУЮ K) K)))
    (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D вЖТвВР[K] D_рЭФЄ) (DрЭФЄ_iso_top K D)
  apply Discrete_of_HomDiscrete (X' := Fin (Module.finrank K D) вЖТ K)
    ((DрЭФЄ_iso_top K D) вИШ (Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft : D вЖТвВР[K] D_рЭФЄ)) (D_iso K D)
  simpa [D_discrete_extracted] using Kn_discrete K D
